chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6220 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.27687/2024 2. For orders on Misc. No.27688/2024 3. For hearing of main case 16.12.2024 Mr. Munsif Jan, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. The petitioner, stated to be an Association of Transporters, has filed this petition seeking recovery of dues for having utilized their vehicles. The documentation on file demonstrates that the dues are claimed for the years uptill 2010. Learned counsel was confronted on the issues of maintainability inter alia as to how a recovery suit could be couched as a writ petition; no aggrieved transporter / vehicle owner is before the Court and instead it was a purported association; and last but not least how could such a claim be maintained in writ proceedings after fourteen years as the same appears to be prima facie barred by laches. Learned counsel remained unable to assist on this count also. Petition found to be misconceived and frivolous hence dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
